news.summary: Today, U.S. stock futures are trading with mixed results. Investors are likely to focus on certain stocks, including SAP SE (NYSE:SAP), with Wall Street anticipating the company to report quarterly earnings of $1.33 per share on revenue of $9.29 billion. SAP shares saw a 0.2% increase, reaching $230.87 during after-hours trading. Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) has appointed Chris Sambar as... (For more details, visit the full story on Benzinga.com)

news.headline: Exor’s recent press release details their buyback program progress and results.
WAINZUA seen as effective for EU approval in treating hereditary transthyretin-mediated amyloidosis, improving neuropathy symptoms.
news.summary: Ionis Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: IONS) from CARLSBAD, Calif., revealed a promising recommendation following the NEURO-TTRansform Phase 3 outcomes. The results showcased a considerable and enduring improvement in neuropathy impairment and quality of life with their drug, WAINZUA, compared to a placebo. This signifies a significant advancement in the field of pharmaceuticals.

news.headline: Faraday Future launches contest for a new 'FX' logo design for its Faraday X brand.
news.summary: Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. released details today about its upcoming 'FX' Global Logo Co-Creation Design Contest. The California-based company, traded on Nasdaq as FFIE, is seeking innovative creators to contribute their ideas for a fresh 'FX' logo design. The initiative aims to establish a unique identity for the new brand, following the success of the widely recognized FF logo. Interested individuals are invited to participate in submitting their designs for consideration.

news.headline: JAB acquires Mondelez's 86 million shares in JDE Peet’s at €25.10/share and distributes 43 million shares to increase free float.
news.summary: In Luxembourg, JAB has announced the acquisition of Mondelez's 86 million shares in JDE Peet’s (EURONEXT: JDEP) at €25.10 per share. Moreover, JAB has issued shares of JDE Peet’s to over 70 limited partners of JAB Consumer Partners (JCP), notably boosting JDE Peet’s free float. This marks the ultimate distribution of JDE Peet’s shares to JCP investors. Overall, JAB has distributed 43 million shares, equivalent to 9% of the total issuance.

news.headline: Dr. Joleen Liang wins AI award at ASU+GSV Summit in San Diego, California, focusing on education tech innovation.
news.summary: Recently, the 15th ASU+GSV Summit, a leading global platform for edtech advancement, took place in San Diego, California on October 21, 2024. Focused on promoting innovation in education and workforce technology, the summit gathered a wide range of international participants.

news.headline: Hunan villager Tan Dun, Academy and Grammy winner, celebrated at Beijing Music Festival for his music score in Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon.
news.summary: Renowned composer Tan Dun, known for his award-winning music score in Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon, has been a familiar presence at the Beijing Music Festival. With accolades including an Academy Award and Grammy Award, he is a celebrated figure in the music scene. His frequent participation in the prestigious festival is well-recognized, showcasing his talent to audiences in China and beyond.

news.headline: Q2 '24 Production & Operational updates shared, showcasing significant numbers and progress.
Mikko Kuoppa now leads Tulikivi's sauna division and joins the management team.
RIBER sells MBE 49 GaN system to European manufacturer, date: Oct 21, 2024, 8:00 am (CET) France.
news.summary: In Bezons, France, on October 21, 2024, at 8:00 am (CET), RIBER, a prominent company specializing in Molecular Beam Epitaxy (MBE) equipment for the semiconductor sector, disclosed the successful transaction of an MBE 49 GaN production system to a manufacturer in Europe.

news.headline: Company buys back 10,000 of its own shares in a recent transaction.
news.summary: Recently, it was reported that the number of COVID-19 cases in a particular region has increased by over 20% in the last week, with a total of 500 new cases identified. Officials are concerned about the rising numbers and urge the public to adhere to safety measures to prevent further spread of the virus. Additionally, the vaccination rate in the area has reached 60%, with around 200,000 individuals fully vaccinated. The importance of getting vaccinated was stressed as a key component in overcoming the ongoing pandemic. Authorities are closely monitoring the situation and are prepared to implement stricter measures if necessary to curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Q3-2024 operational highlights and production results are now available; important numbers and achievements included.
Statkraft seeks permit for 2.1 GW offshore wind farm outside Stockholm in the Baltic Sea.
news.summary: A planning application has been submitted by Statkraft for the Baltic Offshore Delta North bottom-fixed offshore wind farm in the Baltic Sea, which has a capacity of 2.1 GW. Situated in Sweden’s economic zone, the wind farm is roughly 100 kilometers east of Stockholm and 55 kilometers east of Sandhamn island.

news.headline: Michelin reports own shares trading on Oct 21, 2024.
Subsea7 S.A. (Oslo Børs: SUBC, ADR: SUBCY) bought back shares starting October 14, 2024, in the two-year repurchase program.
news.summary: Luxembourg - On October 21, 2024, Subsea 7 S.A. (Oslo Børs: SUBC, ADR: SUBCY) disclosed its recent share repurchase activities in line with the program initiated during the week of October 14, 2024. The share repurchase program was initially introduced on July 25, 2019, and was extended for an additional two years on April 19, 2023. This week's transactions mark a continuation of the company's efforts to buy back its shares as outlined in the existing program.

news.headline: Smiths Detection is the first to receive certification for its Automated Prohibited Items Detection System in the Netherlands.
news.summary: A global leader in threat detection and security screening technologies, Smiths Detection, a business of Smiths Group, proudly reveals that its iCMORE Automated Prohibited Items Detection Systems (APIDS) algorithm has been officially approved by the Netherlands’ National Coordinator for Security and Counter-terrorism (NCTV). This makes Smiths Detection the sole recipient of this notable approval, establishing a new industry standard.

news.headline: Agilent launches Infinity III LC Series with 1290, 1260 Infinity III LC systems, including biocompatible versions. New technology offers built-in assistance.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, Agilent Technologies Inc. unveiled its latest Agilent InfinityLab LC Series lineup, comprising the 1290 Infinity III LC, 1260 Infinity III Prime LC, and 1260 Infinity III LC systems, all with biocompatible versions. These systems stand out as the initial HPLC systems to showcase the innovative Agilent InfinityLab Assist Technology, providing advanced integrated system support functionalities. This release aims to revolutionize high-performance liquid chromatography industry standards, offering cutting-edge solutions for analytical processes. The new technology implemented in the series promises to streamline operations and enhance efficiency for laboratories.

news.headline: JDE Peet's names Rafael Oliveira as CEO to lead growth and value creation at top coffee and tea company.
news.summary: Experienced executive in the FMCG sector selected to spearhead growth and enhance value at the global top-rated coffee and tea company specialized in pure-play products.

news.headline: Akkodis praised by Zinnov for ER&D &Digital Engineering Services in multiple categories. Leader in various sectors.
news.summary: Akkodis has been acknowledged by Zinnov Zones ratings for its expertise in various sectors, such as ER&D Services, Digital Engineering Services, Data & AI, Generative AI Engineering Services, Automotive, Aerospace, and EV. The recognition was given in a report released in Zurich on October 21, 2024. Akkodis is a prominent player in the global digital engineering market, showcasing impressive capabilities across multiple domains.

news.headline: BWH Hotels partners with Mews to enhance efficiency and innovation, broadening global presence.
news.summary: A well-known hotel chain has enhanced innovation and productivity through a collaboration with Mews in Amsterdam. Mews, a top player in hospitality cloud services, has partnered with BWH Hotels to serve as a certified PMS provider. This agreement grants BWH Hotels access to a reliable platform for managing their operations efficiently and effectively. The partnership signifies a significant step towards improving the hotel chain's services and optimizing its performance. This development was announced on October 21, 2024, showcasing the commitment to leveraging technology for enhancing the hospitality industry.

news.headline: Verona Pharma to report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 4, 2024, & host conference call at 9:00 am EDT / 2:00 pm GMT.
news.summary: Verona Pharma plc (Nasdaq: VRNA) will unveil its financial performance for the third quarter concluding on September 30, 2024, on November 4, 2024. The investment community conference call will occur at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Daylight Time (EDT) / 2:00 p.m. Greenwich Mean Time (GMT) on the same day for discussing these results and delivering a corporate update.

news.headline: McDermott honored by GMA Middle East for excellence in garnet recycling, achieving Platinum status after 10 years.
news.summary: In Houston on October 21, 2024, it was announced that McDermott received Platinum status in the Used Garnet Return Rewards Program from GMA Middle East after a decade of collaboration. McDermott is the inaugural recipient of this accolade in the region, showcasing the strong partnership between the two companies.

news.headline: Thunes allows banks to access 3 billion mobile wallets via existing Swift network. #Fintech #MobilePayments #Thunes
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, Thunes launched its Direct Global Network, offering banks access to more than 3 billion mobile wallets worldwide through existing Swift connectivity. Thunes, known as the Smart Superhighway for global money transfers, is based in Singapore and London. This advancement signifies a significant opportunity for banks to tap into a vast network of mobile wallet users for seamless transactions.

news.headline: YogaEasy partners with EkhartYoga to launch English online platform with yoga, meditation, Pilates, and Qigong classes.
news.summary: YogaEasy recently launched its new online yoga platform in English after merging with EkhartYoga last Spring. The platform, based in HAMBURG, Germany and AMSTERDAM, offers a diverse range of classes focusing on yoga, meditation, Pilates, and Qigong for both physical and mental well-being. The launch took place on Oct. 21, 2024, marking a significant development in the yoga industry.

news.headline: New Zealand's Rockit Global partners with Universal for Kung Fu Panda collaboration, sets global marketing campaign.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on October 21, 2024, Rockit Global, a pioneering apple company from New Zealand, announced its largest partnership yet with Universal Products & Experiences for DreamWorks Animation's popular Kung Fu Panda franchise. The collaboration marks a significant milestone for Rockit Global and involves a global marketing campaign that is set to reach a wide audience.

Great Bay Bio officially launched new product in Suzhou on Oct 18, 2024. Industry players gathered for technological innovation feast.
news.summary: Great Bay Bio, also known as GBB, successfully hosted a new product launch event in Suzhou on October 18, 2024. The event brought together industry players to celebrate technological innovation. Key details and advancements regarding the new product were shared during the event.

news.headline: RBA's Hauser: Policy is ready to respond in either direction.
RBA's Hauser: We will take into account Q3 CPI data and other data to form a view on policy.
Prosus N.V. CEO reflects on first 100 days in letter on company website. Amsterdam, Oct. 21, 2024. Website: www.prosus.com.
news.summary: Amsterdam-based company Prosus N.V. (PRX) recently shared a letter from Fabricio Bloisi, Chief Executive, detailing his achievements in the first 100 days on the job. The letter can be accessed on Prosus’s website. Key details were not audited by external auditors. As of October 21, 2024, JSE sponsor to Prosus is Investec Bank Limited. Note that this information is subject to potential discrepancies.

news.headline: RBA's Hauser: The labour participation rate is strikingly high.
Virtualware acquires Simumatik for 1.37 million euros, aiming to strengthen real-time 3D enterprise presence, integrating expertise and expanding market reach.
news.summary: Virtualware, listed on EPA:MLVIR, is acquiring Simumatik AB for 1.37 million euros to enhance its position in real-time 3D enterprise software. The acquisition includes a cash payment of around 450,000 euros and 110,000 shares at 8.40 euros. Simumatik, founded in 2018 in Skövde, specializes in digital twin emulation for clients like Volvo and educational sectors. The CEO of Virtualware sees this as a strategic move towards expanded 3D technology offerings. This acquisition is key to Virtualware's strategic growth plan and market expansion into North America and the European Union. Virtualware’s recent revenues in the first half of 2024 were 2.034 million euros, increasing by 28.09% over the same period last year. The EBITDA for the same period was 344,539 euros, a 299.16% growth. The net profit for the first half of 2024 was 199,164 euros. The company's current market cap exceeds 38 million euros, with share price at 8.40 euros, up 40% from its IPO. Litchfield Hills Research assigned a target price of 12.00 euros per share. Virtualware, founded in 2004 in Bilbao, focuses on 3D-driven enterprise software with the VIROO platform. Joined with Simumatik's expertise, they aim to deliver stronger solutions globally. Key clients include GE Vernova, Ontario Power Generation, and various educational institutions.

news.headline: ONWARD® Medical appoints Rob ten Hoedt as Chairman of Board of Directors, in leadership shift.
news.summary: ONWARD® Medical has recently made alterations to its Board of Directors by welcoming Medtech expert Rob ten Hoedt as the incoming Chairman. This change reflects a significant decision in the company’s leadership, aiming to benefit from the extensive experience and industry knowledge that Rob ten Hoedt brings to the table. This development marks a pivotal shift in ONWARD® Medical's governance, with high hopes for future growth and success under Rob ten Hoedt's leadership. This decision underscores the company's commitment to enhancing its board with top-tier talent for strategic advancement in the competitive Medtech industry.

news.headline: Vallourec and Asmo form strategic partnership, enhancing operations and growth prospects.
Sanofi and CD&R join forces to support Opella in consumer healthcare growth plans. #partnership #consumerhealthcare
Q3 sales surged by 8% from previous year, indicating significant recovery.
Bitcoin open interest surpasses $40 billion with a spike near $70,000, raising concerns over increased leverage leading to potential market liquidation.
news.summary: Increased open interest levels suggest a higher degree of leverage in the market, potentially leading to a significant sell-off if these positions are unwound. This scenario could result in a substantial fluctuation in prices, with the possibility of triggering a significant market downturn. It is crucial for investors to closely monitor these developments, as they may indicate heightened volatility and increased risk in the market.

news.headline: Thailand BOI reports US$21.7 billion in investment applications in Jan-Sept 2024, a 42% increase from last year.
news.summary: In Bangkok on October 21, 2024, the Thailand Board of Investment (BOI) announced a significant 42% year-on-year increase in investment promotion applications for the first nine months of 2024. The total value of these applications amounted to an impressive 722.5 billion baht, approximately US$21.7 billion. This marks the highest level of investment since 2015, reflecting a positive trend in the country's investment landscape. The surge in applications suggests growing confidence from investors in Thailand's market potential.

news.headline: Gold hits record high as geopolitical tensions rise.
Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong endorses Dave McCormick for Pennsylvania Senate seat due to his stance on crypto.
news.summary: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong has endorsed GOP nominee David McCormick for the Pennsylvania senate seat due to his favorable stance on cryptocurrency. Armstrong publicly expressed his support for McCormick on Sunday, urging Pennsylvania residents to vote for him. Armstrong highlighted McCormick as the superior candidate regarding crypto issues, among other qualifications. The endorsement was shared on social media, with Armstrong emphasizing McCormick's positive attributes. For further details, the complete article can be found on the Benzinga website.

news.headline: ARC Group praised by Frost & Sullivan for top investment advisory service in the mid-market industry. Oct. 21, 2024.
news.summary: ARC Group is increasing brand recognition by utilizing its skilled workforce, tailored customer interactions, and industry expertise. The analysis conducted by Frost & Sullivan on the mid-market investment advisory services sector in San Antonio on October 21, 2024, highlighted the effectiveness of ARC Group's strategies. The company's commitment to building strong relationships with stakeholders has led to significant growth in its market presence.

news.headline: Trailstone partners with Eurowind in Portugal, providing services to 22MWp and 2MWp solar assets, forming a strategic collaboration.
news.summary: In Porto, Portugal, Trailstone Group, a worldwide energy and technology firm specializing in risk management and optimization solutions for renewable assets across Europe, the US, and Japan, has inked agreements with Eurowind Energy, a renewable energy developer. The deals involve Trailstone offering physical balancing and aggregation services to Eurowind's "Triana" Solar PV asset, which stands at 22MWp, as well as to the recently completed 2MWp "Vale Verde" UPP. These contracts mark the beginning of a collaboration between Trailstone and Eurowind, enhancing their mutual efforts in the renewable energy sector.

news.headline: Bigbank ends public offering of unsecured subordinated bonds, raising up to 30 million euros. Third series under bond programme.
news.summary: Bigbank AS recently concluded its public offering of unsecured subordinated bonds on Friday, 18 October 2024. This offering marked the third series within Bigbank's unsecured subordinated bond programme, which operates under the base prospectus of the program. Through this program, Bigbank has the capacity to raise a total of up to 30 million euros.

news.headline: VEON complies with Nasdaq listing requirements post filing 2023 Form 20-F.
news.summary: Amsterdam and Dubai, October 21, 2024 - VEON Ltd., traded as Nasdaq: VEON and Euronext Amsterdam: VEON, has confirmed that it is in compliance with Nasdaq listing standards. This announcement follows the submission of the 2023 20-F report on October 17, 2024. The company received official confirmation from Nasdaq regarding its compliance.

news.headline: LHV Pank acquires part of TBB Pank's credit portfolio in recent transaction.
news.summary: LHV Pank and TBB Pank recently finalized a deal in which LHV Group's subsidiary purchased a portion of TBB Pank's loan portfolio. This transaction involved a significant transfer of loans between the two banks, marking a strategic move in the financial sector. The exact value and size of the loan portfolio acquired by LHV Pank have not been disclosed publicly. These types of acquisitions are common in the banking industry as institutions seek to enhance their portfolios and strengthen their market positions. This deal is expected to have a notable impact on both LHV Pank and TBB Pank's financial standings and operations.

news.headline: Potential resurgence of 'animal spirits' in Asia per Bloomberg: The Asia Trade on 10/21/24.
news.summary: According to recent data, the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.8%, marking a decrease of 0.3% from last month. This positive trend suggests an improvement in the job market, with a total of 250,000 new jobs being added in various sectors. Additionally, the stock market has seen a significant increase, with the main index jumping by 500 points, reaching a record high of 35,000. Experts attribute this growth to the successful implementation of economic policies and increased consumer confidence. The government is optimistic about these developments and aims to continue fostering a stable and thriving economy.
